benefits.title: Premium services for you and your family
benefits.description: Upgrade to Premium Gold and enjoy premium benefits.

primaryButton.title: Card and online currency exchange at the best rates

detail.title: Card and online currency exchange with the best rates

features.title: Know the rate in advance
features.description: In the online exchange office, you'll see the exact rate for euros and dollars before you exchange — and you can exchange right away.

features.title: Exchange 24/7
features.description: Exchange anytime, anywhere, at no extra charge.

features.title: Over 1,500 airport lounges
features.description: For entry, you just need your card or the Priority Pass app.

features.title: 4 free visits per year
features.description: You can use them yourself or share them with your loved ones.

primaryButton.title: Travel insurance for you and your family

detail.title: Travel insurance for you and your family

features.title: Coverage up to CZK 15,000,000
features.description: Covers medical expenses abroad, including assistance services, and repatriation to the Czech Republic.

features.title: Compensation for lost luggage and flight delays
features.description: Your personal belongings and luggage are insured up to CZK 30,000, plus compensation for delayed or cancelled flights.

detail.title: Insurance for valuables, cards, electronics and your phone

features.title: Insurance for personal belongings and electronics
features.description: If your personal items, valuables or electronics are lost or stolen, we'll reimburse the purchase of replacements.

features.title: Contribution towards repair or replacement
features.description: If your mobile phone, tablet or smart watch needs repair, or if you buy a new one, you'll get a contribution towards the repair or the purchase.

features.title: Insurance against payment card and payment misuse
features.description: Applies to you and any additional cardholders on your account. Covers misuse of card payments or misuse in mobile banking.

detail.title:
Gold Savings Account
Unlimited. No conditions

features.title: No limits. No conditions.
features.description: Earn interest on your entire balance.

features.title: Activated automatically
features.description: No need to open a new savings account — we'll activate it for you automatically.

features.title: Visa benefit programme rewards
features.description: Enjoy even more benefits with our rewards. By paying at least CZK 1,000 a year, you get access to the Visa benefit programme.

fees.title: Premium service for free? Yes, it's possible
fees.terms: The eligibility conditions are assessed each month. If your situation changes, a different monthly fee will apply in the following months, according to the Gold Account terms and conditions.

info.title: With an income of at least CZK 35,000

newCard.title: The Gold package also includes a Gold card
newCard.description: You'll get the Gold card for free with your account
newCard.otherAddressInfo:
Want the card delivered to a different address?
Update your contact address in About me in Settings.

existingCard.title: You already have a Gold card. Activate the Gold package and get more benefits at a better price
existingCard.description: You'll keep the card for free — plus

newBenefits.title: A savings account with a better rate
Currency exchange with the best rates
newBenefits.description: Available 24/7 when you open a foreign currency account in USD, GBP or EUR.

existingBenefits.title: Travel insurance for you and your family

click2Pay.title: Faster checkout with Click to Pay
click2Pay.description2: you can pay using your email address. That's it. Done.
click2Pay.description3: Your card details are securely stored in the Click to Pay system, which is used by many well-known brands worldwide.
click2Pay.terms: By continuing, you agree to the service terms and conditions, which we'll also save in your documents. You can deactivate this service at any time in Smart Bank.
click2Pay.emailInfo: If you have multiple cards linked to one email address, you can always choose which card to pay with.

staticDocuments.title: Before signing the contract, please read these documents
staticDocuments.subtitle: We'll save all documents in the Documents section in Smart Banka and Internet Banka.

busyLoader.title: Please wait, we need to check everything

scoring.title: We are reviewing your application
scoring.detail: It will only take a moment.

scoringDenied.title: The application cannot be processed
scoringDenied.detail: Unfortunately we cannot process your application for the Gold package.

victory.title:
We're setting up your Premium Gold package.
It will be active by tomorrow at the latest

listItems.title: We'll also activate a Gold savings account as part of the package.
Your card will arrive within 14 days at the latest.
If your account is subject to a monthly fee, we'll charge it automatically at the beginning of next month.

intro.title: First steps with your Gold account

priorityPass.title: Download the Priority Pass app
priorityPass.description: With it, you'll get free access to airport lounges worldwide.

insurance.title: Your Gold Card insurance is now active

infoItem.description: Press and hold your account balance, then drag & drop it here.
